column7: initial state — CPU JIT compile time 1.6351s with -O3
guard initialize_llvm() with static bool — no effect since benchmark warm-up already handles this
disable loop unrolling with -fno-unroll-loops — marginal, within noise
use -O1 instead of -O3 — 1.5% compile speedup but degrades runtime code quality

guard heavy headers (mesh, bvh, hashgrid, volume, texture, noise, matnn) behind WP_USE_* macros
guard intersect.h and intersect_adj.h behind WP_USE_INTERSECT
guard quat.h/spatial.h — guard failed: test_math uses quat without codegen defining WP_USE_QUAT
guard tile operations (~5.2K lines) and tile_reduce/scan/sort behind WP_USE_TILES
guard early tile utility templates — no improvement, templates not expensive to parse
add -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti — no improvement, kernel code already has no EH/RTTI
port full compile-guard system from worktree-2: codegen scans source, emits WP_NO_XXX, guards all headers + adjoint macros
fix compile-guard deps for volume/SVD/hashgrid vec_t/mat_t usage
guard DECLARE_ADJOINTS(float32) — marginal, inline funcs not expensive when uncalled
use host CPU name for TargetMachine — no improvement
